options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -early_estimated_worst_irdrop_factor
options.description: <percent> Early voltage derating factor

options.name: -early_irdrop_data
options.description: <files_or_directories> Specifies the IR drop files or directories to apply when calculating early arrival times at a single delay corner

options.name: -early_irdrop_file
options.description: Specifies the list of IR drop files to apply when calculating early arrival times at a single delay corner

options.name: -early_library_set
options.description: Specifies the library set to associate with this delay corner object for calculating early arrival times at a single delay corner

options.name: -early_opcond
options.description: Specifies the operating condition name to use for calculating early arrival times at a single delay corner

options.name: -early_opcond_library
options.description: Specifies the internal library name for the library in which the early operating condition is defined. This is not the library file name

options.name: -early_rc_corner
options.description: Specifies the RC corner object to associate with this delay corner object

options.name: -early_temp_file
options.description: Specifies the temperature filename for temperature aware delay calculation for early corner

options.name: -irdrop_data
options.description: Specifies the IR drop files or directories to apply to both early and late delay calculation for this delay corner object

options.name: -irdrop_file
options.description: Specifies the list of IR drop files to apply to both early and late delay calculation for this delay corner object

options.name: -late_estimated_worst_irdrop_factor
options.description: <percent> Late voltage derating factor

options.name: -late_irdrop_data
options.description: <files_or_directories> Specifies the IR drop files or directories to apply when calculating late arrival times at a single delay corner

options.name: -late_irdrop_file
options.description: Specifies the list of IR drop files to apply when calculating late arrival times at a single delay corner

options.name: -late_library_set
options.description: Specifies the library set to associate with this delay corner object for calculating late arrival times at a single delay corner

options.name: -late_opcond
options.description: Specifies the operating condition name to use for calculating late arrival times at a single delay corner

options.name: -late_opcond_library
options.description: Specifies the internal library name for the library in which the late operating condition is defined. This is not the library file name

options.name: -late_rc_corner
options.description: Specifies the RC corner object to associate with this delay corner object

options.name: -late_temp_file
options.description: Specifies the temperature filename for temperature aware delay calculation for late corner

options.name: -library_set
options.description: Specifies the library set to associate with this delay corner object

options.name: -name
options.description: Specifies the name for the delay corner object being created

options.name: -opcond
options.description: Specifies the operating condition name to use for setup and hold analysis

options.name: -opcond_library
options.description: Specifies the internal library name for the library in which the operating condition is defined. This is not the library file name

options.name: -pg_net_voltages
options.description: Power/ground net voltages to use for both early/late analysis

options.name: -rc_corner
options.description: Specifies the RC corner object to associate with this delay corner object

options.name: -si_enabled
options.description: Option to control SI behavior

options.name: -temp_file
options.description: Specifies the temperature filename for temperature aware delay calculation for single corner
